questions: Have you ever taken on a new role that radically changed how you saw yourself?
Read Exodus 12:5-7. Read Exodus 12:12-13. Why was it critical for the Israelites to have blood over their doorframes? How does this teach us that salvation happens through substitution?

Read Exodus 12:28-30. This is a heavy moment in the story. Why is it important to remember Pharaoh’s previous actions (like the decree against Hebrew sons in Chapter 1) when we see the consequences falling on Egypt now?

Read 2 Corinthians 5:17. Read Romans 7:15. Why do you think becoming free is a process? Paul talks about the tension between being a new creation and still struggling with sin. How have you experienced that tension in your own life?

Israel’s departure from Egypt was dramatic and occurred at a specific time. Egypt’s departure from Israel (Israel learning a new identity as free people living as the people of God) took much longer. If you are a Christ Follower, what has been your experience with growing into your identity as a follower of Christ?
The crossing-guard story illustrated that identity shapes behavior. How does knowing your identity in Christ change the way you live?

Read Luke 22:19-20. Looking at Jesus’ words during the Last Supper, how does He position Himself as the ultimate fulfillment of that Passover lamb? In what ways does the Exodus story bring greater depth to your understanding of the meaning of communion?

Pastor Matt said, “When our identity changes, our behavior starts to follow.” Is there an area in your life where you feel “stuck” and you desire to experience freedom? How can we find hope in Christ while on our journey towards transformation?

sections.title: Pray
sections.body: Pray that we may grow in understanding how deeply loved we are by an all-powerful God. Pray that we may grow in recognizing who God is and that we may focus our attention on Him, instead of ourselves. As we continue to reflect on this message, pray that we would be transformed more into the image of Jesus.

sections.title: Next Steps
sections.body: Check out the resources page for links to several Bible reading plans and other helpful tools. Explore other opportunities for growth and transformation by checking out courses.
